$comment: MCP servers require authentication. Configure each server in your Claude settings. Authentication is handled via OAuth or API keys depending on the provider.

taizen.description: Taizen MCP — connect once instead of 15+ individual MCP connectors. Indexes your Gong calls, CRM, documents, and more so every teammate can query all sources. Also schedules recurring AI agents. EU region: https://eu.mcp.usetaizen.com/mcp. Create an account at https://usetaizen.com to get started.
taizen.auth_note: Connect to Taizen and authenticate via OAuth with your existing Taizen account

salesforce.description: Salesforce CRM integration for account, contact, opportunity, and activity data.

hubspot.description: HubSpot CRM integration for contacts, deals, companies, and marketing data.

gong.description: Gong conversation intelligence for call recordings, transcripts, and insights.

slack.description: Slack integration for messaging, notifications, and channel updates.

google-drive.description: Google Drive integration for document storage and retrieval.

notion.description: Notion integration for wikis, databases, and documentation.

linear.description: Linear integration for issue tracking and project management.

github.description: GitHub integration for repositories, issues, and pull requests.

glean.description: Glean enterprise search for unified search across all company data sources.

amplitude.description: Amplitude analytics for product usage data and user insights.

mixpanel.description: Mixpanel analytics for product analytics and user behavior.

intercom.description: Intercom integration for customer support and messaging.

zendesk.description: Zendesk integration for support tickets and customer service.

outreach.description: Outreach.io integration for sales engagement sequences.

salesloft.description: Salesloft integration for sales engagement and cadences.

linkedin.description: LinkedIn integration for professional profiles and company data.

clearbit.description: Clearbit enrichment for company and contact data.

zoominfo.description: ZoomInfo integration for B2B contact and company intelligence.

g2.description: G2 integration for software reviews and buyer intent.

6sense.description: 6sense integration for account-based intent data and predictions.
